case_title: JOHNSON, MICHELLE VS ALEMU, ABAI JEMERE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.18 FILED BY JOHNSON, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT ALEMU, ABAI JEMERE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALEMU, ABAI JEMERE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEMU, ABAI JEMERE $3,200.18 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,220.18, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
